creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
py-openimageio PORTREVISION - yes, it should use the master PORTREVISION but keeps getting automated entries on dependency changes.

As for @dir, make check-plist says it's ok, but during install I get

pkg-static: Warning: @dirrm is deprecated please use @dir

Seems there is no error when removing @dirrm entries, so we don't swap @dirrm and @dirrmtry entries for @dir we just remove them completely and use @dir just for special cases?
